Uploaded June 26th, 2022 by Drewinette
Send a correction
Post Comment
Another place to get it.
QuoteReply
# Aug 12 2003 at 10:54 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591790079863
View User Forum
52 posts
Another very good place to farm the blood is the ranger huts in Lesser Fay. It is a camp of about 8 wood elves or so, all very very green to a lvl 55. The best part is the camp has a very fast respawn. I would so in and wipe out the elves, and they would repop in less then 5 minutes.

They dropped the blood about 1 out of ever 3 or 4. I camped the spot for 15-20 minutes and got 8 vials of blood.

Loc is in Lesser Fay
Neg200 Pos1200 -maybe the other way around

A great spot for you dark elves to get your blood without killing members of your own race.

Thogor Wraithlance
55 Dark Elf Shadowknight
Sworn Few
Povar Server
▲ Page top
Elven blood
QuoteReply
# Jun 30 2003 at 2:14 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362507728
1 post
Probably the best place to farm for this is Mistmoore. They are all DE in there and not too hard. Should be much easier than other places as a high lvl char can whoop up in there fairly easy.
▲ Page top
Gulf of Gunthak
QuoteReply

Scholar
222 posts
A Dark Elf Initiate dropped Elven Blood in Gunthak. Was guarding the ramp to Nadox.

# May 18 2001 at 3:12 PM Rating: Default

can high elves use this?
▲ Page top
RE: what about he
QuoteReply
# May 18 2001 at 3:29 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592245548959
Scholar
286 posts
It's not 'used' for anything. It's an ingredient to create Shadow Temper (1 elven blood, 1 Neriak Nectar, 2 essences of shadows, brewed in a brew barrel). While any skilled brewer can make the temper, Neriak Nectar is only sold in Neriak or achieved through some newbie Dark Elven quests...
▲ Page top
Used for...
QuoteReply
# Apr 18 2001 at 1:39 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591756045091
13 posts
Dark elven cultural recipes. It's part of the temper.
